title: CSX (CSX) Beats Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates

title: CSX Stock Gains After Reporting Q2 Results Above Expectation, Clocks Revenue Growth Of 28%
text: CSX Corporation (NASDAQ: CSX) reported second-quarter revenue growth of 28% year-over-year to $3.82 billion, beating the consensus of $3.65 billion. The increase reflects higher revenue in nearly all markets driven by pricing gains, fuel surcharge, and the addition of Quality Carriers.

title: CSX Corp. Announces Second Quarter EPS of $0.54
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., July 20, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) today announced second quarter 2022 net earnings of $1,178 million, or $0.54 per share, compared to $1,173 million, or $0.52 per share in the same period last year. Second quarter 2022 operating income was $1.70 billion compared to $1.69 billion in the prior year period.

title: Is CSX Corporation Stock A Buy Before Earnings?

title: OSHA proposes fines for CSX over Baltimore coal terminal explosion
text: The Occupational Safety and Health Administration is proposing CSX be fined $121,200 over citations related to a December 2021 explosion at the company's coal terminal in Baltimore. The explosion, which occurred at CSX's Curtis Bay Coal Terminal, was felt from several miles away, according to local media reports and tweets from nearby residents.
